{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84748114?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/SQU4NCH", "id": 84748114, "login": "SQU4NCH", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0NzQ4MTE0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/SQU4NCH", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47673", "cvss": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

The `jwt` and `jwk` middlewares do not verify that the `Authorization` header value uses the`Bearer` scheme. Any two-part header value — regardless of the scheme name in the first position — proceeds to JWT verification. A request presenting a valid JWT under a non-`Bearer` scheme identifier (such as `Basic` or `Token`) is authenticated identically to a correctly formed `Bearer` request.

### Details

When processing an `Authorization` (or custom) header, the middleware splits the value on whitespace and uses the second token as the JWT to verify. It does not check that the first token is `bearer` (case-insensitively). RFC 6750 specifies that JWT bearer tokens must be presented using the `Bearer` scheme; other scheme identifiers carry distinct semantics and may be subject to different policies in network-layer security controls.

This discrepancy means that scheme-aware external controls — such as WAF rules, API gateways, or reverse proxies that apply policies specific to the `Bearer` scheme identifier — can be bypassed by presenting a valid JWT under a different scheme name.

This issue affects `hono/jwt` and `hono/jwk` middleware.

### Impact

An attacker who possesses a valid JWT may present it under a non-`Bearer` scheme identifier and still pass middleware authentication.

This may lead to:

- Bypass of network-layer security controls that inspect or filter requests based on the authorization scheme identifier
- Token reuse across authentication schemes in applications that use multiple authorization mechanisms

This issue affects applications where `hono/jwt` or `hono/jwk` authentication is combined with external controls that enforce scheme-based access policies.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00199, "percentile": 0.09716}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T17:52:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47673"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-06-04T17:52:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47673", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/commit/5463db2735476959b8af67756f4e513f4fe19115", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/releases/tag/v4.12.21", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono: JWT middleware accepts any Authorization scheme, not only Bearer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T17:52:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f577-qrjj-4474", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.21", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hono: JWT middleware accepts any Authorization scheme, not only Bearer
